arts.ttl: Gary Neville makes brutal Arsenal vs Man United prediction - 'This is the type of game'
arts.sum: Manchester United face Arsenal on Sunday looking to kickstart a positive run until the end of the season

arts.ttl: 15 players could miss Man Utd vs Arsenal amid Bukayo Saka and Gabriel Martinelli return decision
arts.sum: Asked if they could be back after the March international break, he said: “I think so, but again, let’s see how they evolve in the next few weeks to make the right steps & then after that, they’ve been out for a long, long time, so we’re going to have to integrate them as well gradually. Despite the fact Bukayo Saka and Gabriel Martinelli could not recover from injury in time to feature, Leandro Trossard and Martin Odegaard stepped up after a string of disappointing displays in the final third.

arts.ttl: Edu talks Nottingham Forest owner into big decision – Arsenal research played a key role
arts.sum: Edu Gaspar was key to Nottingham Forest owner Evangelos Marinakis moving to invest in São Paulo, using information he’d garnered at Arsenal to his advantage. That’s according to journalist Jorge Nicola, who covers the ongoing situation with Marinakis’ ongoing effort to invest into Brazilian football. arts.ttl: Ajax release Antony statement and make feelings clear on Man Utd transfer flop
arts.sum: Antony joined Manchester United from Ajax in the summer of 2022, with fines picked up in the final days of his time in Amsterdam at the centre of a legal case in recent weeks

arts.ttl: Arsenal could break Premier League record in Man United clash as Leandro Trossard bids to join exclusive club
arts.sum: Arsenal could achieve an unprecedented Premier League winning record when they cross paths with Manchester United in Sunday's tantalising fixture at Old Trafford.
